task_description:
基于 Glassmorphism 设计方案修改 /Users/lzz/Desktop/崂山道士.html：
1. 应用玻璃态风格（毛玻璃效果、渐变背景、半透明卡片、模糊边框）
2. 使用设计预览中的 CSS 变量和样式系统（--glass-primary、--accent-cyan 等）
3. 保留原有游戏逻辑和故事内容
4. 新增 3-5 条剧情支线（如：修仙路线、还俗路线、隐居路线等）
5. 完成后保存到 /Users/lzz/Desktop/崂山道士.html

参考设计预览：/Users/lzz/Desktop/macagent_workspace/ducks/local_71b8dd5c_dtask_a1/workspace/glassmorphism_preview.html

【重要】保存文件时必须使用实际路径：/Users/lzz/Desktop，禁止用 /Users/xxx/ 或 $(whoami)。

【工作目录】请将产出文件保存到: /Users/lzz/Desktop/macagent_workspace/ducks/local_69779502_dtask_b2/workspace

action_checkpoints.reasoning: 需要先读取参考设计预览文件，了解 Glassmorphism 的 CSS 变量定义、颜色系统、毛玻璃效果实现方式，为后续样式改造做准备
action_checkpoints.output:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>崂山道士 - Glassmorphism 设计方案</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :root {
            /* Glassmorphism 色彩方案 */
            --glass-primary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            --glass-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            --glass-tertiary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            --glass-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
            --glass-active: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            
            /* 背景渐变色 */
            --bg-gradient-start: #0f172e;
            --bg-gradient-mid: #1a2a4a;
            --bg-gradient-end: #0d1a2e;
            
            /* 强调色 */
            --accent-cyan: #00d9ff;
            --accent-purple: #a855f7;
            --accent-pink: #ec4899;
            --accent-gold: #fbbf24;
            
            /* 文字色 */
            --text-primary: #ffffff;
            --text-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            --text-tertiary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            
            /* 模糊效果 */
            --blur-sm: blur(10px);
            --blur-md: blur(20px);
            --blur-lg: blur(30px);
            
            /* 边框 */
            --border-light: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            --border-medium: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "楷体", "SimKai", serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-gradient-start) 0%, var(--bg-gradient-mid) 50%, var(--bg-gradient-end) 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* 背景装饰元素 */
        body::before {
            content: "";
            position: fixed;
            top: -50%;
            right: -10%;
            width: 600px;
            height: 600px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 0;
            animation: float 20s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        body::after {
            content: "";
            position: fixed;
            bottom: -20%;
            left: -5%;
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 0;
            animation: float 25s ease-in-out infinite reverse;
        }

        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(30px); }
        }

        .game-container {
            max-width: 900px;
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--glass-primary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            border-radius: 24px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            box-shadow: 
                0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3),
                inset 0 0 60px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            animation: slideUp 0.8s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes slideUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2) 0%, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.15) 100%);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            padding: 40px 30px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .header::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3), transparent);
        }

        .header h1 {
            font-size: 2.8em;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan) 0%, var(--accent-purple) 50%, var(--accent-pink) 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .chapter-title {
            font-size: 1.1em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            font-weight: 300;
        }

        .story-content {
            padding: 35px;
            min-height: 280px;
            max-height: 420px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            line-height: 1.8;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 8px;
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        .story-content::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            border-radius: 10px;
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
        }

        .story-text {
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            text-indent: 2em;
        }

        .cursor {
            display: inline-block;
            width: 2px;
            height: 1.2em;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            animation: blink 1s infinite;
            vertical-align: text-bottom;
            box-shadow: 0 0 10px var(--accent-cyan);
        }

        @keyframes blink {
            0%, 50% { opacity: 1; }
            51%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        }

        .options-container {
            padding: 30px;
            background: var(--glass-secondary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
        }

        .options-label {
            font-size: 0.95em;
            color: var(--accent-cyan);
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            font-weight: 600;
            text-transform: uppercase;
        }

        .options {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 12px;
        }

        .option-btn {
            padding: 16px 24px;
            background: var(--glass-tertiary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            border: var(--border-light);
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1.05em;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
            text-align: left;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .option-btn::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: -100%;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }

        .option-btn:hover {
            background: var(--glass-hover);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
            transform: translateX(8px);
            box-shadow: 
                0 8px 24px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2),
                inset 0 0 20px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .option-btn:hover::before {
            left: 100%;
        }

        .option-btn:active {
            background: var(--glass-active);
            transform: translateX(4px);
        }

        .controls {
            padding: 25px 30px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            background: var(--glass-secondary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
        }

        .control-btn {
            padding: 12px 28px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2));
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            color: var(--accent-cyan);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .control-btn:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3));
            border-color: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* 模态框 */
        .modal {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            z-index: 2000;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; }
            to { opacity: 1; }
        }

        .modal.active {
            display: flex;
        }

        .modal-content {
            background: var(--glass-primary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
            box-shadow: 
                0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
                inset 0 0 40px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            animation: slideDown 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes slideDown {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .modal-title {
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            font-size: 1.6em;
            margin-bottom: 28px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
            padding-bottom: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 1em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .form-group input,
        .form-group select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            border: var(--border-light);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .form-group input::placeholder {
            color: var(--text-tertiary);
        }

        .form-group input:focus,
        .form-group select:focus {
            outline: none;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
            border-color: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .modal-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }

        .modal-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 14px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-weight: 600;
            border: none;
        }

        .modal-btn.primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            color: white;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
        }

        .modal-btn.primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4);
        }

        .modal-btn.secondary {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .modal-btn.secondary:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

        /* 聊天面板 */
        .chat-panel {
            display: none;
            padding: 25px;
            background: var(--glass-secondary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            border-top: var(--border-light);
        }

        .chat-panel.active {
            display: block;
            animation: slideUp 0.3s ease;
        }

        .chat-messages {
            max-height: 280px;
            overflow-y: auto;
            margin-bottom: 18px;
            padding: 18px;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            border: var(--border-light);
            border-radius: 12px;
        }

        .chat-message {
            margin-bottom: 14px;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            line-height: 1.6;
            animation: messageSlide 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes messageSlide {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(10px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

            bac

    <title>崂山道士 - Glassmorphism 设计方案</title>
    <style>

            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2), transparent);
            transition: left 0.5s ease;
        }

        .option-btn:hover {
            background: var(--glass-hover);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4);
            transform: translateX(8px);
            box-shadow: 
                0 8px 24px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2),
                inset 0 0 20px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
        }

        .option-btn:hover::before {
            left: 100%;
        }

        .option-btn:active {
            background: var(--glass-active);
            transform: translateX(4px);
        }

        .controls {
            padding: 25px 30px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 15px;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
            background: var(--glass-secondary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
        }

        .control-btn {
            padding: 12px 28px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2));
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            color: var(--accent-cyan);
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .control-btn:hover {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3), rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.3));
            border-color: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
            transform: translateY(-2px);
        }

        /* 模态框 */
        .modal {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            z-index: 2000;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes fadeIn {
            from { opacity: 0; }
            to { opacity: 1; }
        }

        .modal.active {
            display: flex;
        }

        .modal-content {
            background: var(--glass-primary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            padding: 40px;
            border-radius: 20px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            max-width: 500px;
            width: 90%;
            box-shadow: 
                0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4),
                inset 0 0 40px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            animation: slideDown 0.3s ease;
        }

        @keyframes slideDown {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(-30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .modal-title {
            text-align: center;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            font-size: 1.6em;
            margin-bottom: 28px;
            letter-spacing: 2px;
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
            padding-bottom: 18px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }

        .form-group {
            margin-bottom: 22px;
        }

        .form-group label {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            color: var(--text-secondary);
            font-size: 1em;
            font-weight: 500;
        }

        .form-group input,
        .form-group select {
            width: 100%;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-sm);
            border: var(--border-light);
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            color: var(--text-primary);
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
        }

        .form-group input::placeholder {
            color: var(--text-tertiary);
        }

        .form-group input:focus,
        .form-group select:focus {
            outline: none;
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.12);
            border-color: rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.6);
            box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .modal-buttons {
            display: flex;
            gap: 15px;
            margin-top: 30px;
        }

        .modal-btn {
            flex: 1;
            padding: 14px;
            border-radius: 10px;
            font-family: inherit;
            font-size: 1em;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.3s ease;
            font-weight: 600;
            border: none;
        }

        .modal-btn.primary {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan), var(--accent-purple));
            color: white;

        }

        .modal-btn.primary:hover {
            transform: translateY(-2px);
            box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.4);
        }

        .modal-btn.secondary {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            color: var(--text-primary);
            border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
        }

        .modal-btn.secondary:hover {
            background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>崂山道士 - Glassmorphism 设计方案</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
        }

        :root {
            /* Glassmorphism 色彩方案 */
            --glass-primary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
            --glass-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
            --glass-tertiary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
            --glass-hover: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.25);
            --glass-active: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
            
            /* 背景渐变色 */
            --bg-gradient-start: #0f172e;
            --bg-gradient-mid: #1a2a4a;
            --bg-gradient-end: #0d1a2e;
            
            /* 强调色 */
            --accent-cyan: #00d9ff;
            --accent-purple: #a855f7;
            --accent-pink: #ec4899;
            --accent-gold: #fbbf24;
            
            /* 文字色 */
            --text-primary: #ffffff;
            --text-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8);
            --text-tertiary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
            
            /* 模糊效果 */
            --blur-sm: blur(10px);
            --blur-md: blur(20px);
            --blur-lg: blur(30px);
            
            /* 边框 */
            --border-light: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2);
            --border-medium: 2px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3);
        }

        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", "楷体", "SimKai", serif;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--bg-gradient-start) 0%, var(--bg-gradient-mid) 50%, var(--bg-gradient-end) 100%);
            min-height: 100vh;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            padding: 20px;
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        /* 背景装饰元素 */
        body::before {
            content: "";
            position: fixed;
            top: -50%;
            right: -10%;
            width: 600px;
            height: 600px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.15) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 0;
            animation: float 20s ease-in-out infinite;
        }

        body::after {
            content: "";
            position: fixed;
            bottom: -20%;
            left: -5%;
            width: 500px;
            height: 500px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.1) 0%, transparent 70%);
            border-radius: 50%;
            z-index: 0;
            animation: float 25s ease-in-out infinite reverse;
        }

        @keyframes float {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0px); }
            50% { transform: translateY(30px); }
        }

        .game-container {
            max-width: 900px;
            width: 100%;
            background: var(--glass-primary);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-lg);
            border-radius: 24px;
            border: var(--border-medium);
            box-shadow: 
                0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3),
                inset 0 0 60px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
            overflow: hidden;
            position: relative;
            z-index: 1;
            animation: slideUp 0.8s ease-out;
        }

        @keyframes slideUp {
            from {
                opacity: 0;
                transform: translateY(30px);
            }
            to {
                opacity: 1;
                transform: translateY(0);
            }
        }

        .header {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.2) 0%, rgba(236, 72, 153, 0.15) 100%);
            backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            -webkit-backdrop-filter: var(--blur-md);
            padding: 40px 30px;
            text-align: center;
            border-bottom: var(--border-light);
            position: relative;
            overflow: hidden;
        }

        .header::before {
            content: "";
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3), transparent);
        }

        .header h1 {
            font-size: 2.8em;
            font-weight: 700;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--accent-cyan) 0%, var(--accent-purple) 50%, var(--accent-pink) 100%);
            -webkit-background-clip: text;
            -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
            background-clip: text;
            letter-spacing: 3px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(0, 217, 255, 0.3);
        }
